stories.headline: Tens of thousands evacuated in Southern California over chemical tank crisis
stories.body: Tens of thousands of people in Southern California have been told to leave their homes, with officials issuing a dire warning that a chemical tank at an aerospace facility is in "crisis" and will either leak or explode. https://abcnews.com/US/evacuation-orders-issued-california-city-chemical-tank-fails/story?id=133234846&cid=social_twitter_abcn

stories.headline: Thousands under evacuation in Garden Grove due to toxic chemical tank leak
stories.body: #BreakingNews: Thousands of Orange County residents are once again under evacuation orders Friday morning after a massive storage tank leak at an aerospace facility in Garden Grove continued to raise concerns overnight. https://ktla.com/news/local-news/thousands-evacuated-again-after-toxic-tank-leak-in-garden-grove/
